title: World Models
note: Original Ha and Schmidhuber project page; useful background for model-based environment simulation.

title: Robotic world models—conceptualization, review, and engineering best practices
note: Review article for robotics-specific world-model terminology and engineering context.

title: A Survey of Embodied World Models
note: Survey of embodied world models, benchmarks, and representative robotics/embodied AI works.

title: World Action Model
note: Curated robotics world-model list containing world-action and action-interactive model papers; replace with exact paper when identified from audio.

title: Agentic workflows
note: Andrew Ng's overview of agentic design patterns for LLM applications.

title: A Survey on LLM-Based Agentic Workflows and LLM-Profiled Components
note: Survey tying ReAct, Reflexion, Tree of Thoughts, and planner/evaluator components into agentic workflows.

title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving with Large Language Models
note: Canonical search-style LLM reasoning method often compared with ReAct and agentic planning.

title: RT-2: Vision-Language-Action Models Transfer Web Knowledge to Robotic Control
note: Google DeepMind VLA model connecting web-scale knowledge and robot actions.

title: OpenVLA
note: Open-source vision-language-action model for generalist robot control.

title: Diffusion Policy
note: Imitation-learning policy class often discussed in modern robot learning.

title: DreamerV3
note: Model-based reinforcement learning line using learned world models.

title: V-JEPA
note: Meta AI video joint-embedding predictive architecture, related to predictive world-model discussions.
